references.title: Centralize Header and Footer in the Root Layout to ensure platform-wide consistency, and clean up redundant marketing elements.

brainMetadata.summary: Centralize Header and Footer in the Root Layout to ensure platform-wide consistency, and clean up redundant marketing elements.
Task tracker for platform standardization and global layout implementation.

Finalized the platform standardization for Kisan Kamai.
- Standardized Header and Footer across all pages by centralizing them in the RootLayout and removing local instances.
- Updated the Footer with the mandatory copyright notice: "© 2026 Kisan Kamai. Built with ❤️ for Bharat".
- Ensured all Footer links use 'font-normal'.
- Implemented a clean, form-less Feature Request page aligned with the provided design.
- Removed redundant "Owner Opportunity" and "Success Stories" sections from the owner-benefits page.
- Resolved build-time linting errors to ensure a clean production build.
